rows.text: Wilmar has adopted leading standards and frameworks to ensure high-quality sustainability reporting.
rows.source_sentence: To ensure high-quality sustainability reporting, we have adopted leading standards and frameworks that are among the most widely used and trusted.

rows.text: Wilmar’s near- and long-term science-based emissions reduction targets have been officially validated by the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi).
rows.source_sentence: We are proud to have our near- and long-term science-based emissions reduction targets officially validated by the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi).

rows.text: Wilmar is committed to absolute reductions in Scope 1 and 2 emissions, as well as Scope 3 emissions from our supply chain.
rows.source_sentence: These targets, approved under the SBTi Corporate Net-Zero Standard and the SBTi Forest, Land and Agriculture (FLAG) Guidance, commit us to absolute reductions in Scope 1 and 2 emissions, as well as Scope 3 emissions from our supply chain.

rows.text: Wilmar's No Deforestation and No People Exploitation Sugar (NDPE Sugar programme) was formally recognised as Gold Level Equivalent in the Farm Sustainability Assessment (FSA) 3.0 by the Sustainable Agriculture Initiative Platform (SAI Platform).
rows.source_sentence: Notably, our No Deforestation and No People Exploitation Sugar (NDPE Sugar programme) was formally recognised as Gold Level Equivalent in the Farm Sustainability Assessment (FSA) 3.0 by the Sustainable Agriculture Initiative Platform (SAI Platform).

rows.text: Wilmar provided access to free and quality education to over 12,000 children of school-going age living in its plantations in 2024.
rows.source_sentence: Providing access to free and quality education to over 12,000 children of school-going age living in our plantations.

rows.text: This Roadmap provides clear guidance for the industry to collectively reduce emissions, aligned with a 1.5-degree Celsius pathway.
rows.source_sentence: This Roadmap provides clear guidance for the industry to collectively reduce emissions, aligned with a 1.5-degree Celsius pathway.

rows.text: Wilmar has made significant strides in implementing our NDPE Policy, supported by robust supplier engagement programmes and comprehensive monitoring systems.
rows.source_sentence: As a leading global agribusiness company, Wilmar has made significant strides in implementing our NDPE Policy, supported by robust supplier engagement programmes and comprehensive monitoring systems.

rows.text: These proactive measures are designed to identify and mitigate potential risks of deforestation and peatland development within our supply chain.
rows.source_sentence: These proactive measures are designed to identify and mitigate potential risks of deforestation and peatland development within our supply chain.

rows.text: Wilmar is proactively preparing to meet the requirements of the European Union Deforestation Regulation (EUDR), which came into effect in 2023 and will be fully enforced from 30 December 2025.
rows.source_sentence: We are also proactively preparing to meet the requirements of the European Union Deforestation Regulation (EUDR), which came into effect in 2023 and will be fully enforced from 30 December 2025, following a one-year delay from the original timeline.

rows.text: Wilmar has established a dedicated Grievance Procedure where stakeholders can raise any sustainability-related grievances through a rigorous and transparent resolution process.
rows.source_sentence: Wilmar has established a dedicated Grievance Procedure where stakeholders can raise any sustainability-related grievances through a rigorous and transparent resolution process.

rows.text: Wilmar ensures that stakeholders are involved in the development, implementation and improvement processes of our grievance mechanism.
rows.source_sentence: We also ensure that our stakeholders are involved in the development, implementation and improvement processes of our grievance mechanism.

rows.text: Wilmar’s Grievance Procedure was updated in 2019 following consultations with and feedback from various stakeholders.
rows.source_sentence: Our Grievance Procedure was updated in 2019 following consultations with and feedback from various stakeholders.

rows.text: Wilmar is a long-standing member of the Roundtable on Sustainable Palm Oil (RSPO) since its inception in 2004.
rows.source_sentence: As a long-standing member of the Roundtable on Sustainable Palm Oil (RSPO) since its inception in 2004, we have consistently contributed to its initiatives by participating in various working groups.

rows.text: ZERO NEW DEVELOPMENT on peatland in Wilmar’s landbank
rows.source_sentence: ZERO NEW DEVELOPMENT on peatland in Wilmar’s landbank

rows.text: 842 HA of conservation areas in our sugarcane plantations and mills in Australia and India
rows.source_sentence: 842 HA of conservation areas in our sugarcane plantations and mills in Australia and India

rows.text: REGULAR MONITORING OF CONSERVATION AREAS AND ZERO DEFORESTATION in Wilmar’s operational areas
rows.source_sentence: REGULAR MONITORING OF CONSERVATION AREAS AND ZERO DEFORESTATION in Wilmar’s operational areas

rows.text: Reduced our Scope 1 and 2 absolute GHG emissions by 4.3% from 2023
rows.source_sentence: Reduced our Scope 1 and 2 absolute GHG emissions by 4.3% from 2023

rows.text: Reduced our Scope 1 FLAG emissions by 18.3% from 2023
rows.source_sentence: Reduced our Scope 1 FLAG emissions by 18.3% from 2023

rows.text: ACHIEVED MORE THAN 8.0% REDUCTION IN WATER CONSUMPTION INTENSITY for below regions: ♦ Indonesia: 0.95 m³/MT Fresh Fruit Bunches (FFB) ♦ Malaysia: 1.25 m³/MT FFB ♦ Ghana: 1.27 m³/MT FFB
rows.source_sentence: ACHIEVED MORE THAN 8.0% REDUCTION IN WATER CONSUMPTION INTENSITY for below regions: ♦ Indonesia: 0.95 m³/MT Fresh Fruit Bunches (FFB) ♦ Malaysia: 1.25 m³/MT FFB ♦ Ghana: 1.27 m³/MT FFB

rows.text: Invested around US$4.0 MILLION in employee training and development
rows.source_sentence: Invested around US$4.0 MILLION in employee training and development

rows.text: Over US$13.9 MILLION contributed to support community investment and philanthropic activities in China, Indonesia, Malaysia, Australia, New Zealand, Fiji, Papua New Guinea, Ghana, Nigeria, Myanmar, Vietnam and Singapore
rows.source_sentence: Over US$13.9 MILLION contributed to support community investment and philanthropic activities in China, Indonesia, Malaysia, Australia, New Zealand, Fiji, Papua New Guinea, Ghana, Nigeria, Myanmar, Vietnam and Singapore

rows.text: 29* out of 35 palm oil mills are RSPO- certified (82.9%*)
rows.source_sentence: 29* out of 35 palm oil mills are RSPO- certified (82.9%*)

rows.text: 82.1%* or 252,487 ha* of our oil palm plantations are RSPO-certified
rows.source_sentence: 82.1%* or 252,487 ha* of our oil palm plantations are RSPO-certified

rows.text: 25* out of 34 palm oil mills are ISPO-certified (73.5%*)
rows.source_sentence: 25* out of 34 palm oil mills are ISPO-certified (73.5%*)

rows.text: 7* out of 11 independent palm oil mills completed ISPO certification audits (63.6%*)
rows.source_sentence: 7* out of 11 independent palm oil mills completed ISPO certification audits (63.6%*)

rows.text: 100%* of palm oil mills (8*) and oil palm plantations (20*) are MSPO-certified
rows.source_sentence: 100%* of palm oil mills (8*) and oil palm plantations (20*) are MSPO-certified

rows.text: ZERO recalls issued for food safety reasons
rows.source_sentence: ZERO recalls issued for food safety reasons

rows.text: 87.2% of our food and food ingredient factories above 5,000 sqm are certified
rows.source_sentence: 87.2% of our food and food ingredient factories above 5,000 sqm are certified

rows.text: Achieved 98.5%* traceability to mill
rows.source_sentence: Achieved 98.5%* traceability to mill

rows.text: Achieved 91.0%* traceability to plantation
rows.source_sentence: Achieved 91.0%* traceability to plantation

rows.text: As of December 2024, 87 grievance cases were logged, of which 84 cases were closed while 3 are ongoing
rows.source_sentence: As of December 2024, 87 grievance cases were logged, of which 84 cases were closed while 3 are ongoing

rows.text: Achieved 100% response rate for all grievances raised since 2015
rows.source_sentence: Achieved 100% response rate for all grievances raised since 2015

rows.text: In collaboration with the Chinese Nutrition Society, YKA pledged over RMB100.0 MILLION (approximately US$14.0 MILLION) over 10 years to support scientific research in food science
rows.source_sentence: In collaboration with the Chinese Nutrition Society, YKA pledged over RMB100.0 MILLION (approximately US$14.0 MILLION) over 10 years to support scientific research in food science

rows.text: Wilmar conducts regular monitoring of conservation areas and ensures zero deforestation in its operational areas.
rows.source_sentence: REGULAR MONITORING of conservation areas and ZERO DEFORESTATION in Wilmar’s operational areas

rows.text: Wilmar monitors for any incidences of non-compliant deforestation and fires within its concessions and those of its suppliers.
rows.source_sentence: A key aspect of our approach involves monitoring for any incidences of non-compliant deforestation and fires within our concessions and those of our suppliers.

rows.text: Wilmar has been a member of the NDPE Implementation Reporting Framework (IRF) since 2019 and publishes its progress through its Palm NDPE Annual Implementation Report 2024.
rows.source_sentence: Since 2019, we have been a member of the NDPE Implementation Reporting Framework (IRF) and we publish our progress through our Palm NDPE Annual Implementation Report 2024.

rows.text: Wilmar’s NDPE Policy requires all new oil palm land developments to identify and safeguard HCV areas and HCS forests following international best practice guidance, including RSPO Principles and Criteria (P&C), High Conservation Value Network (HCVN), and High Carbon Stock Approach (HCSA).
rows.source_sentence: In line with our NDPE Policy, all new oil palm land developments, both in our own operations and across our supply base, are required to identify and safeguard HCV areas and HCS forests following international best practice guidance, including: • RSPO Principles and Criteria (P&C) • High Conservation Value Network (HCVN) • High Carbon Stock Approach (HCSA)

rows.text: Wilmar’s NDPE Policy, introduced in 2013, reinforces its commitment to not developing on HCS forests and HCV areas within its palm operations and supply chain.
rows.source_sentence: The introduction of our NDPE Policy in 2013 marked a critical milestone in reinforcing our commitment to not developing on HCS forests and HCV areas within our palm operations and supply chain.

rows.text: Wilmar’s NDPE Sugar Policy, launched in 2021, prohibits the conversion of legally protected or HCV areas in its sugar operations.
rows.source_sentence: This commitment extends to our sugar operations that prohibits conversion of legally protected or HCV areas through our NDPE Sugar Policy, which was launched in 2021.

rows.text: Wilmar owns eight sugar mills in Australia that generate their own electricity by burning bagasse.
rows.source_sentence: Wilmar owns eight sugar mills in Australia which generate their own electricity by burning bagasse.
